source_target: Arbitration Opinion and Award, AAA Case No. 01-25-0005-2917 (Three Percent Pay Escalator; sick-reserve time-bar)
notes: Primary source for tx_houston_fire_2024. 17-page, 44,958-char clean text layer. Grievance/contract-interpretation arbitration under CBA Article 14, not Sec.174.1535 compulsory interest arbitration -- interest_arbitration_flag will NOT be set on the contracts.csv row.

source_target: Settlement Agreement and Release, same case no. 01-25-0005-2917 (Attachment 1 to the Award)
notes: Companion document to the Award (explicitly incorporated by reference as 'Attachment 1' per the Award's paragraph 9); scanned/image PDF, extracted via ingest/extract_text.py OCR fallback (7,175 chars). Not the row's primary full_text_path -- referenced in the row's notes/total_comp_note.

source_target: Memorandum of Understanding Regarding the CBA 2025-2029 (dated 2024-06-11)
